current_objective: Integrate Google Search Grounding with google-genai SDK into Writer (Agent B) workflow

steps_completed.action: Migrated Gemini Model Client Initialization from google-generativeai to new google-genai SDK.
steps_completed.finding: Replaced legacy import and configure logic with Client initialization. Created backward-compatible wrappers (GeminiGenAIWrapper, GeminiChatWrapper, GeminiResponseWrapper, GeminiPartWrapper, GeminiUsageMetadataWrapper) to avoid breaking existing agent loops and REST mock paths.

steps_completed.action: Configured Google Search Grounding tool conditionally for Agent B (Writer).
steps_completed.finding: Injected 'google_search' tool to LLMRouter for Agent B on live runs. GeminiGenAIWrapper maps 'google_search' to types.Tool(google_search=types.GoogleSearch()).

steps_completed.action: Implemented extraction and logging of Google Search Grounding metadata.
steps_completed.finding: GeminiResponseWrapper parses candidates[0].grounding_metadata to extract title and URI. Appends them to 'grounding_sources' and prints them during execution. Also updated execution_telemetry and save_telemetry to log these sources in run_history.json.
Successfully validated that the pipeline simulation runs without errors with the new SDK wrappers.

next_step: Sync agent_pipeline.py to skill folder and commit the changes.
